definition: Unique identifier for each sample, corresponding to the number of the metal tag affixed to a stake at the corner of each plot.
source_files: lai_au_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_au_summary_data_cleaned.csv | lai_meadow_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_meadow_summary_data_cleaned.csv | lai_shrub_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_shrub_summary_data_cleaned.csv | lai_tree_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_tree_summary_data_cleaned.csv
mapping_notes: Used as a site/sample dimension variable.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: primary site or plot identifier; keep as row-level dimension in all LAI tables.

BERVO Combination: Community type, Context = land cover class
definition: Broad land cover classification for the measurement site. meadow=site with predominantly herbaceous vegetation or site with woody shrubs less than 0.5 m tall. shrub=woody plants with canopies greater than 1 m^2 and up to 3 m tall. tree=woody plants more than 3 m tall and belonging to a pre-defined species list. understory=predominantly herbaceous ground cover under quaking aspen (Populus tremuloides) forest canopy measured in an ancillary aspen understory project. overstory=quaking aspen (P. tremuloides) trees more than 3 m tall measured in an ancillary aspen understory project.
source_files: lai_au_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_au_summary_data_cleaned.csv | lai_meadow_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_meadow_summary_data_cleaned.csv | lai_shrub_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_shrub_summary_data_cleaned.csv | lai_tree_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_tree_summary_data_cleaned.csv
mapping_notes: Broad land-cover/vegetation class; repeated constants can move to array metadata.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: vegetation/community class; move to array-level metadata only if tables are split by location type.

definition: Two-letter or short code identifying the sampling area within the study region.
source_files: lai_au_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_au_summary_data_cleaned.csv | lai_meadow_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_meadow_summary_data_cleaned.csv | lai_shrub_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_shrub_summary_data_cleaned.csv | lai_tree_metadata_cleaned.csv | lai_tree_summary_data_cleaned.csv
mapping_notes: Retain the original CHESS sampling-area code as a dimension variable; resolved sampling-area name is exported separately as Sampling_Area_Full_Name.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: source sampling-area code retained for provenance and paired with derived resolved sampling-area metadata.

definition: Human-readable sampling-area name derived from the Sampling_Area code.
mapping_notes: Derived lookup dimension. Most codes resolve from 2025 vegetation site metadata; AU resolves from LAI ancillary aspen understory metadata; RU is collapsed to Taylor River Road because both upper and lower Taylor River Road labels occur for that code.
sample_values: Ancillary aspen understory | Almont Triangle South | Almont Triangle North | Carbon Creek | Taylor River Road
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: resolved sampling-area label grouped with Sampling_Area.

definition: Calendar date of field data collection following ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD.
mapping_notes: Collection date dimension or array metadata if constant; summary rows inherit this from site metadata during generation.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: collection date varies by site; array-level only for single-date arrays.

BERVO Combination: Description, Context = sky and illumination conditions
definition: Description of sky and illumination conditions during measurement (e.g., clear and sunny, cloudy, hazy).
mapping_notes: Data dictionary defines this as a description; map to Description rather than Condition.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: illumination description used to interpret scattering correction.

definition: Whether a scattering correction (K record) is required for LAI computation. TRUE under sunny or hazy conditions; FALSE under fully cloudy or overcast skies where diffuse light predominates.
mapping_notes: Boolean flag; consider exact processing/QC flag term only if these are queried often.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: processing/QC flag for scattering correction.

BERVO Combination: Identifier, Context = associated scattering correction record
definition: Site_Number of the site whose K record is used for scattering correction. NA when Requires_K is FALSE. Multiple sites may share a single K record if measured under similar open-sky conditions.
mapping_notes: References the site/record used for K scattering correction.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: provenance link to the K record/site used for correction.

BERVO Combination: Binary, Context = scattering correction record collected at site
definition: Whether the K (scattering correction) measurements were physically collected at this site (TRUE) or at the site identified in Associated_K (FALSE). When TRUE, the K records are contained in the same file as the A and B records.
mapping_notes: Boolean flag.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: boolean provenance flag.

BERVO Combination: Azimuth, Context = scattering correction sensor cap
definition: Comma-separated list of azimuths (degrees) toward which the K record sensor view cap was oriented during scattering correction measurements. Meadow sites typically use four azimuths (315, 225, 135, 45); shrub sites typically use a single azimuth (0). NA when Requires_K is FALSE.
mapping_notes: Uses new generic Azimuth term.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: K-record view orientation; null where no K record was required.

BERVO Combination: Field of view angle, Context = A/B record sensor cap
definition: Field-of-view angle of the sensor cap used during A and B record collection.
mapping_notes: Uses new Field of view angle term.
modeling_recommendation: array_level_metadata: constant 90 degree A/B sensor cap field of view in cleaned files.

BERVO Combination: Field of view angle, Context = wide-sky reference
definition: Wide-sky field-of-view angle used for the full hemispherical reference measurement.
mapping_notes: Uses new Field of view angle term.
modeling_recommendation: array_level_metadata: constant 360 degree wide-sky reference field of view in cleaned files.

definition: Latitude of the measurement site in decimal degrees, WGS 84 datum. NOTE: These values represent measurement site centroids. They are used for scattering correction computations and are not intended for precise geospatial analysis. For accurate geospatial information, please use the geojson files in the associated package 'CHESS 2025: Location data for field observations and sampling.'
mapping_notes: WGS 84 centroid latitude; not precise survey position.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: site centroid coordinate; not the precise survey location.

definition: Longitude of the measurement site in decimal degrees, WGS 84 datum. These values represent measurement site centroids. They are used for scattering correction computations and are not intended for precise geospatial analysis. For accurate geospatial information, please use the geojson files in the associated package 'CHESS 2025: Location data for field observations and sampling.'
mapping_notes: WGS 84 centroid longitude; not precise survey position.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: site centroid coordinate; not the precise survey location.

definition: Free-text field documenting measurement anomalies, terrain conditions, procedural deviations, or additional context. NA indicates no notes were recorded.
mapping_notes: Free-text notes; source NA values should export as null.
sample_values: on the SFA LAI unit | only 3 corners measured | no records captured for M4-7
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: free-text QC/procedure notes; export source NA values as null.

BERVO Combination: Quality control flag, Context = leaf area index processing
definition: Controlled-text field with codes indicating QC flags. g1: One or more gap fraction values exceeded 1.0 and were capped at 1.0. a0: A record contains one or more 0.0 values; gap fraction is coerced to NA and excluded from LAI and scattering correction computations. b0: B record contains one or more 0.0 values; gap fraction is allowed to stand at 0.0 and is included in LAI and scattering correction computations.
mapping_notes: Uses new Quality control flag term; source values are controlled text QC codes and may contain multiple flags.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: controlled QC flag values.

BERVO Combination: Taxon, Taxonomic level = species, Context = focal tree
definition: Four-letter USDA taxonomic species code for the focal tree within or near the LAI plot. ABLA=subalpine fir (Abies lasiocarpa), PICO=lodgepole pine (Pinus contorta), PIEN=Engelmann spruce (Picea engelmannii), POTR=quaking aspen (Populus tremuloides), PSME=Rocky Mountain Douglas fir (Pseudotsuga menziesii).
mapping_notes: Retain the original USDA PLANTS-style focal-tree species code as a dimension variable; derived taxon metadata rows expand the code to family/genus/specific epithet/binomial/NCBI Taxon ID/GBIF Taxon ID where available.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: focal-tree source code retained for provenance and paired with derived taxon metadata.

BERVO Combination: Taxon, Taxonomic level = family, Context = focal tree
definition: Taxonomic family of the focal tree derived from the USDA-style focal tree species code.
mapping_notes: Derived from Focal_Tree_Species code; PSME uses accepted family Pinaceae even though the local vegetation species list lacks a corrected Pseudotsuga menziesii row.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: focal-tree taxon family derived from source code.

BERVO Combination: Taxon, Taxonomic level = genus, Context = focal tree
definition: Taxonomic genus of the focal tree derived from the USDA-style focal tree species code.
mapping_notes: Derived from Focal_Tree_Species code; PSME genus is Pseudotsuga based on the LAI data dictionary and tree-site metadata.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: focal-tree genus derived from source code.

BERVO Combination: Taxon, Taxonomic level = species, Context = focal tree
definition: Specific epithet of the focal tree derived from the USDA-style focal tree species code.
mapping_notes: Derived from Focal_Tree_Species code and stored separately from the retained USDA-style code.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: focal-tree species epithet derived from source code.

BERVO Combination: Taxon, Taxonomic level = species, Context = focal tree binomial name
definition: Scientific binomial name of the focal tree derived from the USDA-style focal tree species code.
mapping_notes: Derived from Focal_Tree_Species code; PSME is corrected to Pseudotsuga menziesii despite a local vegetation metadata typo.
sample_values: Populus tremuloides | Pseudotsuga menziesii | Pinus contorta | Picea engelmannii | Abies lasiocarpa
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: focal-tree scientific binomial derived from source code.

BERVO Combination: Identifier, Context = NCBI Taxonomy identifier, Taxonomic level = species
definition: NCBI Taxonomy identifier for the focal tree taxon derived from the USDA-style focal tree species code.
mapping_notes: Store as an identifier rather than a numeric measurement; values are mapped from the focal-tree binomial.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: focal-tree NCBI Taxonomy identifier derived from source code.

BERVO Combination: Identifier, Context = GBIF taxon identifier, Taxonomic level = species
definition: GBIF taxon identifier for the focal tree taxon derived from the USDA-style focal tree species code when locally available.
mapping_notes: GBIF IDs are available locally for ABLA/PICO/PIEN/POTR; PSME should be left empty unless a corrected GBIF mapping is added.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: focal-tree GBIF taxon identifier derived from source code; partial missing values should remain empty in exports.

BERVO Combination: Binary, Context = plot contains focal tree
definition: Whether the LAI measurement plot physically contains the focal tree (TRUE) or is located nearby in a representative stand (FALSE).
mapping_notes: Boolean flag.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: boolean plot/focal-tree relationship.

BERVO Combination: Identifier, Context = LI-COR above-canopy reference record
definition: Identifier for the LI-COR LAI-2200C A (above-canopy reference) data record in the raw instrument file. Often shared across multiple sites within a sampling area and measured under similar open-sky conditions.
mapping_notes: Identifier for raw A record.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: raw A-record identifier; useful provenance key into raw file tables.

definition: Identifier for the LI-COR LAI-2200C B (below-canopy) data record in the raw instrument file. Typically unique to each site.
mapping_notes: Identifier for raw B record.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: raw B-record identifier; useful provenance key into raw file tables.

BERVO Combination: Identifier, Context = LI-COR scattering correction record
definition: Identifier for the LI-COR LAI-2200C K (scattering correction) data record in the raw instrument file. Sometimes shared across nearby sites measured under similar open-sky conditions.
mapping_notes: Identifier for raw K record.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: raw K-record identifier; useful provenance key into raw file tables.

BERVO Combination: Azimuth, Context = A/B record sensor orientation
definition: Compass azimuth toward which the sensor was oriented for A and B records, and for the final K record observation.
mapping_notes: Uses new generic Azimuth term.
modeling_recommendation: row_level_metadata: A/B record sensor orientation.

definition: Index (1–4) identifying the below-canopy measurement position within the LAI plot, corresponding to one of four cardinal corners of the square plot.
mapping_notes: Definition describes an index identifying the corner; map to Index rather than Position.
modeling_recommendation: dimension_variable: below-canopy plot-corner index.

BERVO Combination: Leaf area index, Context = clumping-corrected true estimate, Method = LI-COR 2200
definition: Leaf area index computed using the LI-COR native 2200 algorithm, corrected for foliage clumping via the apparent clumping factor.
mapping_notes: Clumping-corrected true LAI; distinguished from effective LAI by context.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Leaf area index, Context = effective non-clumping-corrected estimate, Method = LI-COR 2200
definition: Effective leaf area index from the LI-COR 2200 algorithm, assuming a random (non-clumped) foliage distribution. This is the uncorrected estimate prior to application of the clumping factor.
mapping_notes: Effective LAI assuming random foliage distribution before apparent clumping factor correction.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Standard error, Context = leaf area index, Method = LI-COR 2200
definition: Standard error of the leaf area index estimate from the LI-COR 2200 algorithm, quantifying uncertainty across the azimuthal ring integration.
mapping_notes: Standard error of the LI-COR 2200 leaf area index estimate.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

definition: Apparent clumping factor from the LI-COR 2200 algorithm, defined as the ratio of effective LAI to true LAI. Values less than 1 indicate non-random (clumped) foliage distribution.
mapping_notes: Uses new Apparent clumping factor term.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Leaf area index, Context = clumping-corrected true estimate, Method = Welles and Norman
definition: Leaf area index computed using the Welles and Norman inversion method, which fits an ellipsoidal leaf angle distribution to gap fraction data and applies a clumping correction.
mapping_notes: Clumping-corrected true LAI; distinguished from effective LAI by context.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Leaf area index, Context = effective non-clumping-corrected estimate, Method = Welles and Norman
definition: Effective leaf area index from the Welles and Norman method, assuming a random foliage distribution prior to clumping correction.
mapping_notes: Effective LAI assuming random foliage distribution before apparent clumping factor correction.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Standard error, Context = leaf area index, Method = Welles and Norman
definition: Standard error of the leaf area index estimate from the Welles and Norman method.
mapping_notes: Standard error of the Welles and Norman leaf area index estimate.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Apparent clumping factor, Method = Welles and Norman
definition: Apparent clumping factor from the Welles and Norman method.
mapping_notes: Uses new Apparent clumping factor term.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Leaf area index, Context = clumping-corrected estimate, Method = Lang
definition: Leaf area index computed using the Lang method, which estimates LAI from the logarithmic average of gap fractions at each zenith ring, providing a clumping-corrected value.
mapping_notes: Clumping-corrected LAI from the Lang method.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Standard error, Context = leaf area index, Method = Lang
definition: Standard error of the leaf area index estimate from the Lang method.
mapping_notes: Standard error of the Lang leaf area index estimate.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Leaf area index, Context = intermediate estimate before scattering correction, Method = ellipsoidal inversion
definition: Leaf area index computed using ellipsoidal inversion of gap fraction data prior to scatter correction, representing an intermediate estimate in the scatter correction workflow.
mapping_notes: Intermediate LAI estimate prior to scattering correction.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Leaf area index, Context = scatter-corrected estimate, Method = scattering correction
definition: Scatter-corrected leaf area index, adjusted for radiation scattering through foliage by accounting for non-zero leaf transmittance at the measurement wavelength, typically yielding a higher L than uncorrected estimates.
mapping_notes: Scatter-corrected LAI.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Scattering correction factor, Context = leaf area index, Method = scattering correction
definition: Final estimated scattering correction factor, applied to gap fraction estimates to compute L_SCATCOR.
mapping_notes: Scattering correction factor used to compute scatter-corrected LAI.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Apparent clumping factor, Method = scattering correction
definition: Apparent clumping factor derived from the scatter-corrected gap fraction analysis.
mapping_notes: Uses new Apparent clumping factor term.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

BERVO Combination: Algorithm parameter, Context = leaf angle distribution chi, Method = scattering correction
definition: Leaf angle distribution chi parameter estimated during the scatter correction procedure, describing the eccentricity of the assumed ellipsoidal leaf angle distribution. A value of 1 indicates a spherical distribution, values less than 1 indicate more erectophile foliage, and values greater than 1 indicate more planophile foliage.
mapping_notes: Uses existing BERVO Algorithm parameter term for chi parameter.
modeling_recommendation: data_variable: analysis-ready LAI summary variable.

definition: Mean ring-level gap fraction in intermediate rlai output.
mapping_notes: Raw/intermediate zip files excluded for now because BERVO mapping requires specialized LI-COR/rlai knowledge.
modeling_recommendation: not_exported: raw/intermediate zip files excluded for now.

definition: Mean contact frequency (Kbar), the logarithm of gap fraction divided by path length, for each sensor ring.
mapping_notes: Raw/intermediate zip files excluded for now because BERVO mapping requires specialized LI-COR/rlai knowledge.
modeling_recommendation: not_exported: raw/intermediate zip files excluded for now.
